---
description: Use when drafting or updating a VirtRTLab specification for sysfs, socket API, daemon behavior, install outcomes, or privilege model
---

Read the current README.md and all relevant docs under docs/ before drafting.

Produce a spec update that:

1. Defines observable behavior only.
2. Covers success cases and error behavior.
3. Uses tables for structured interfaces.
4. Uses JSON examples for protocol messages when applicable.
5. Ends with Rationale and Open questions.

Call out every ambiguity you had to resolve.
